x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Service Operations Workspace (SOW) is where Now Assist TSOM AI features surface to operators. Without SOW, AI alerts and correlation insights are not visible.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate Service Operations Workspace via sys_plugins_list.do. Configure SOW views for your operations team.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_c3f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cc3
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Service Operations Workspace (SOW) is where Now Assist TSOM AI features surface to operators. Without SOW, AI alerts and correlation insights are not visible.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Service Operations Workspace Configuration</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var checkPlugin = (function checkPlugin(storeScope, pluginSource) {    var result = { found: false, version: "", table: "" };    try {        var saGR = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app");        saGR.addQuery("scope", storeScope);        saGR.setLimit(1);        saGR.query();        if (saGR.next()) {            result.found = true;            result.version = saGR.getValue("version") || "";            result.table = "sys_store_app";            return result;        }    } catch(e1) {}    if (pluginSource) {        try {            var spGR = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins");            spGR.addQuery("source", pluginSource);            spGR.addQuery("active", true);            spGR.setLimit(1);            spGR.query();            if (spGR.next()) {                result.found = true;                result.version = spGR.getValue("version") || "";                result.table = "sys_plugins";                return result;            }        } catch(e2) {}    }    return result;});
    var result = checkPlugin("com.snc.service_operations_workspace", "com.snc.service_operations_workspace");
    if (!result.found) {
        var gr = new GlideRecord("sys_scope");
        gr.addQuery("scope", "sn_sow_itom");
        gr.addQuery("active", true);
        gr.setLimit(1);
        gr.query();
        if (gr.next()) { result.found = true; result.table = "sys_scope"; }
    }
    if (result.found) {
        return { status: "ready",
            actualValue: "Service Operations Workspace is active | source: " + result.table,
            finding: "SOW active -- Now Assist TSOM AI insights visible to operations team." };
    } else {
        return { status: "needs_attention",
            actualValue: "Service Operations Workspace not found",
            finding: "Service Operations Workspace not active. Now Assist TSOM alert summaries and AI recommendations require SOW to surface to operators." };
    }
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>AIOPS</module><number>CHK0000444</number><order>20</order><remediation_guidance>Activate Service Operations Workspace via sys_plugins_list.do. Configure SOW views for your operations team.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>c3f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cc3</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Service Operations Workspace Configuration</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_c3f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cc3</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
